title: Queue Implementation using Arrays
description: A visual representation of a Queue data structure implemented with an array, showing the front and rear pointers, enqueue and dequeue operations, and the concept of a circular buffer to handle overflow.
relationships: Front pointer tracks the first element for dequeue
Rear pointer tracks the last element for enqueue
Enqueue adds an element at the rear
Dequeue removes an element from the front
Pointers wrap around to simulate a circular queue when the end of the array is reached
